title: Intensely Savory British Beef Yorkshire Pudding
description: A herbal and snappy Scottish dish featuring Italian seasoning and shio-koji-cure, perfect for a date night, cooked in a salt block vessel.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, salt, and black pepper.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the eggs and milk.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
Add the beef, italian seasoning, and shio-koji to the batter and stir until just combined.
Heat the salt block in the oven for 10 minutes.
Remove the salt block from the oven and pour the batter onto it.
Return the salt block to the oven and cook for 20 minutes.
Reduce the oven temperature to 375 degrees Fahrenheit and cook for an additional 10 minutes.
